title: BEM-840 remove queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/removed']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
removed=[]
archived=[]
# Remove queue files and invalid queue files from active contour.
for folder in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid']:
    path=Path(folder)
    if path.exists():
        archive=Path('governance/removed')/(path.name+'_removed_bem840')
        archive.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
        for p in sorted(path.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                target=archive/p.name
                target.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
                p.unlink()
                removed.append(str(p)); archived.append(str(target))
# Remove queue processor scripts from repo.
for p in [Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh'),Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')]:
    if p.exists():
        archive=Path('governance/removed')/(p.name+'.removed_bem840')
        archive.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
        p.unlink()
        removed.append(str(p)); archived.append(str(archive))
# Remove queue processor steps from codex-runner.yml.
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
runner_changed=False
if runner.exists():
    lines=runner.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    new=[]
    i=0
    while i < len(lines):
        line=lines[i]
        if '- name: Process workflow dispatch queue' in line or '- name: Commit workflow dispatch queue results' in line:
            runner_changed=True
            i+=1
            while i < len(lines) and not lines[i].lstrip().startswith('- name:') and not lines[i].lstrip().startswith('- uses:'):
                i+=1
            continue
        if 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh' in line or 'scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh' in line:
            runner_changed=True
            i+=1
            continue
        new.append(line)
        i+=1
    runner.write_text('\n'.join(new)+sep)
# Create explicit contract that JSON queue is removed, not replaced.
contract=Path('governance/protocols/BEM840_NO_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE.md')
contract.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contract.write_text('# BEM-840 | No Workflow Dispatch Queue'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Решение: workflow_dispatch_queue удаляется из активного контура. Нельзя чинить проблему заменой одного JSON. Очередь была источником отказа и должна быть убрана. Дальше допустим только прямой dispatch-канал или Deno-side dispatch без JSON queue. Отчёт не останавливает разработку.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'workflow_dispatch_queue_removed_from_active_contour','removed':removed,'archived':archived,'runner_changed':runner_changed,'contract':str(contract),'next_action':'verify codex-runner has no queue references, then implement direct dispatch path without JSON queue','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_remove_workflow_dispatch_queue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_remove_workflow_dispatch_queue.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Remove Workflow Dispatch Queue | REMOVED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: verify no workflow_dispatch_queue references and implement direct dispatch path without JSON queue. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Queue removed from active contour. Next: verify no queue refs and implement direct dispatch path.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_remove_workflow_dispatch_queue.json','governance/reports/bem840_remove_workflow_dispatch_queue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(contract),str(runner)] + archived)
ops_applied.append('Removed workflow_dispatch_queue from active contour, archived active queue files, removed queue processor scripts, and deleted queue processing steps from codex-runner')
"""
